summary: Test suite is incomplete and non-functional. Fixture files (patch-bump.psd1, minor-bump.psd1, major-bump.psd1) are referenced but never defined—tests will fail immediately. Workflow YAML is referenced but not provided. Crucially, there are zero unit tests for individual functions (Parse-SemanticVersion, Get-BumpType, Format-Version, New-ChangelogEntry, etc.), violating the TDD requirement. Act integration tests exist but lack fixture data and omit validation of changelog format/content. No error scenarios tested (invalid versions, missing files, git errors). No edge cases (non-conventional commits, empty history, zero versions, mixed types). The suite only covers happy-path workflow validation and 3 basic bump cases. Missing implementation artifacts and weak test isolation make this unrunnable.
